rulings.Case Title: STANLEY G HILTON VS. JP MORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, April 12, 2012, line 4. DEFENDANTs JP MORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A, CALIFORNIA RECONVEYANCE COMPANY and DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY's DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT. Continued to April 19, 2012. Moving party ordered to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6C and provide courtesy copy of First Amended Complaint to Dept. 501 by 4 PM April 13, 2012. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: EVANS PROPERTY MANAGEMENT, INC. VS. GUSTAVO RIOS et al

PLAINTIFF EVANS PROPERTY MANAGEMENT, INC.'s Motion To Set Aside Dismissal And Place Case On Active Calendar. Continued to April 19, 2012. Moving party ordered to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6b and deliver courtesy copy of moving papers to Dept. 501 by 4 PM on April 13, 2012. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PENNYMAC MORTAGE INVESTMENT TRUST HOLDINGS I,LLC VS. ALICE M SMITH et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, April 12, 2012, line 2. PLAINTIFF PENNYMAC MORTAGE INVESTMENT TRUST HOLDINGS I, LLC's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. rulings.Case Title: VISTA DEL MONTE AFFORDABLE HOUSING INC. VS. KAREN LAWRENCE
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Discovery Responses; Memo Of P & A; Dec
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, April 12, 2012, line 5. PLAINTIFF VISTA DEL MONTE AFFORDABLE HOUSING INC.'s Motion To Compel Discovery Responses. Grant, subject to opposition, re form interrogatories, special interrogatories and request for production of documents. Plus sanctions totalling $590.00. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DEAN LACAP VS. GLENDA VARGAS et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, April 12, 2012, line 3. DEFENDANTs GLENDA VARGAS and NELSON MENDEZ's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Sustain with leave to amend to plead in good faith complaince with or exemption to San Francisco Rent Ordinance 37.9(c). = (501/REQ)
